what: Working with API keys and environment variables
title: distilleR
text: distilleR package requires authentication token function properly. token can obtained authenticating getAuthenticationToken() function. function needs personal API key provided DistillerSR. can provide API key one two ways: setting .Renviron file. including manually authentication request.

previous_headings: Working with API keys and environment variables
title: distilleR
text: .Renviron file used define environment variables R loads automatically start session. approach particularly convenient sensitive information like API keys, allows use R script function without hardcoding . Place .Renviron file home directory (example, C:/Users/username/Documents/.Renviron Windows ~/.Renviron Unix-like systems). can create edit file plain text editor. Add DistillerSR API key following format: DISTILLER_API_KEY=<your_distiller_api_key> saving file, R automatically read API key startup.

previous_headings: Working with API keys and environment variables
what: Setting the API key manually for the authentication request
title: distilleR
text: Alternatively, can provide API key directly distillerKey argument getAuthenticationToken() function. useful refer store API key globally. example:

previous_headings: Working with API keys and environment variables
title: distilleR
text: distilleR package needs know instance URL DistillerSR running function properly. can provide instance URL one two ways: setting .Renviron file. including manually API request. prefer store URL .Renviron file, add DistillerSR instance URL following format: DISTILLER_INSTANCE_URL=<your_distiller_instance_url> saving file, R automatically read API key startup. Alternatively, can provide instance URL directly distillerInstanceUrl argument functions require . useful refer store instance URL globally. example:
code: token <- getAuthenticationToken(   distillerKey = "<your_distiller_api_key>",   distillerInstanceUrl = "<your_distiller_instance_url>" ) projects <- getProjects(   token = token,   distillerInstanceUrl = "<your_distiller_instance_url>" )

title: distilleR
text: main purpose distilleR query DistillerSR APIs specific project report codes retrieve relevant information across various endpoints. examples demonstrating use functions package. title: distilleR
text: can retrieve specific report getReport() function specifying project ID report ID, follows: Note large reports, CSV files generally better choice. Exporting Excel may cause issues tables exceed one million rows, whereas CSV handles large datasets reliably.
code: projectId_ <- 1234 reportId_ <- 567  report <- getReport(   projectId = projectId_,   reportId = reportId_,   format = "excel",   distillerToken = token)  print(head(report))

what: Authenticate to a DistillerSR session. — getAuthenticationToken
title: Authenticate to a DistillerSR session. — getAuthenticationToken
text: Authenticates user DistillerSR instance using personal access key. function returns valid authentication token can used access protected DistillerSR API endpoints.

title: Authenticate to a DistillerSR session. — getAuthenticationToken
code: getAuthenticationToken(   distillerInstanceUrl = Sys.getenv("DISTILLER_INSTANCE_URL"),   distillerKey = Sys.getenv("DISTILLER_API_KEY"),   timeout = 1800 )

title: Authenticate to a DistillerSR session. — getAuthenticationToken
text: distillerInstanceUrl character (string). base URL DistillerSR instance. default: Sys.getenv("DISTILLER_INSTANCE_URL"). distillerKey character (string). personal access key generated DistillerSR. default: Sys.getenv("DISTILLER_API_KEY"). timeout integer. maximum number seconds wait authentication response. default: 1800 seconds (30 minutes).

title: Authenticate to a DistillerSR session. — getAuthenticationToken
text: string containing valid DistillerSR authentication token.

title: Authenticate to a DistillerSR session. — getAuthenticationToken
text: default, personal access key instance URL read environment variables DISTILLER_API_KEY DISTILLER_INSTANCE_URL.

title: Authenticate to a DistillerSR session. — getAuthenticationToken
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # If 'DISTILLER_INSTANCE_URL' and 'DISTILLER_API_KEY' are defined in your # environment (e.g. .Renviron). distillerToken_ <- getAuthenticationToken()  # If 'distillerInstanceUrl' and 'distillerKey' are to be specified manually. distillerToken_ <- getAuthenticationToken(   distillerInstanceUrl = "https://url.to.distiller.instance",   distillerKey = "YOUR_API_KEY") } # }

what: Get the list of the Distiller projects associated to the authenticated user. — getProjects
title: Get the list of the Distiller projects associated to the authenticated user. — getProjects
text: function queries DistillerSR API retrieve list projects accessible authenticated user. requires authentication token valid API instance URL. result dataframe listing available projects.

title: Get the list of the Distiller projects associated to the authenticated user. — getProjects
Get the list of the Distiller projects associated to the authenticated user. — getProjects
text: distillerInstanceUrl character (string). distiller instance URL. default: Sys.getenv("DISTILLER_INSTANCE_URL"). distillerToken character (string). token user gets authenticated. timeout integer. maximum number seconds wait response. default: 1800 seconds (30 minutes).

title: Get the list of the Distiller projects associated to the authenticated user. — getProjects
text: tibble four columns: id: project ID. name: name project. de_project_id. is_hidden.

title: Get the list of the Distiller projects associated to the authenticated user. — getProjects
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ distillerToken_ <- getAuthenticationToken()  projects_ <- getProjects(distillerToken = distillerToken_) } # }

what: Get a Distiller report associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReport
title: Get a Distiller report associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReport
text: function queries DistillerSR API retrieve saved report associated given project ID. requires user authentication valid API endpoint URL. result dataframe containing metadata saved report.

title: Get a Distiller report associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReport
code: getReport(   projectId,   reportId,   format = c("excel", "csv"),   distillerInstanceUrl = Sys.getenv("DISTILLER_INSTANCE_URL"),   distillerToken,   timeout = 1800,   attempts = 1,   retryEach = 600,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Get a Distiller report associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReport
text: projectId integer. ID project provided DistillerSR. reportId integer. ID report provided DistillerSR. format character (string). desired format document. can either excel csv. distillerInstanceUrl character (string). distiller instance URL. default: Sys.getenv("DISTILLER_INSTANCE_URL"). distillerToken character (string). token user gets authenticated. timeout integer. maximum number seconds wait response. default: 1800 seconds (30 minutes). attempts integer. maximum number attempts. default: 1 attempt. retryEach integer. delay attempts. default: 600 seconds (10 minutes). verbose logical. flag specify whether make function verbose . default: TRUE.

title: Get a Distiller report associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReport
text: data frame containing Distiller report designed within DistillerSR.

title: Get a Distiller report associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReport
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ distillerToken_ <- getAuthenticationToken()  projects_ <- getProjects(distillerToken = distillerToken_)  reports_ <- getReports(   projectId = projects_$id[1],   distillerToken = distillerToken_)    report_ <- getReport(   projectId = projects_$id[1],   reportID = reports_$id[7],   format = "csv",   distillerToken = distillerToken_) } # }

what: Get the list of the Distiller reports associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReports
title: Get the list of the Distiller reports associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReports
text: function queries DistillerSR API retrieve list saved reports associated given project ID. requires user authentication valid API endpoint URL. result dataframe containing metadata saved report.

title: Get the list of the Distiller reports associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReports
code: getReports(   projectId,   distillerInstanceUrl = Sys.getenv("DISTILLER_INSTANCE_URL"),   distillerToken,   timeout = 1800 )

title: Get the list of the Distiller reports associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReports
text: projectId integer. ID project provided DistillerSR. distillerInstanceUrl character (string). distiller instance URL. default: Sys.getenv("DISTILLER_INSTANCE_URL"). distillerToken character (string). token user gets authenticated. timeout integer. maximum number seconds wait response. default: 1800 seconds (30 minutes).

title: Get the list of the Distiller reports associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReports
text: tibble four columns: id: ID saved report. name: name report. date: creation date report. view: format report (e.g., html, csv, excel).

title: Get the list of the Distiller reports associated to a project of the authenticated user. — getReports
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ distillerToken_ <- getAuthenticationToken()  projects_ <- getProjects(distillerToken = distillerToken_)  reports_ <- getReports(   projectId = projects_$id[1],   distillerToken = distillerToken_) } # }
